  ADD COLUMN `queuedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,

  ADD COLUMN `slaDeadlineAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD INDEX `idx_wc_assigned_user` (`tenantId`, `assignedUserId`),
  ADD INDEX `idx_wc_queued` (`tenantId`, `queuedAt`);
